title: Jubilant FoodWorks is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Jubilant FoodWorks is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Jubilant FoodWorks is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Jubilant FoodWorks:
Jubilant FoodWorks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jubilant FoodWorks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
